docs.text:
iPayX Protocol — FINTRAC-registered FX forensic audit layer
iPayX Protocol — Neutral FX Verification Layer
iPayX Protocol is the neutral FX verification layer for fintech sales teams and FX brokers. We audit foreign-exchange transactions, compare the rate a bank or card network applied against the real-time mid-market rate, reveal invisible spreads, quantify FX costs, and project annual savings.
How It Works
Enter your transaction
 – Amount, currencies (e.g. CAD → USD), and the rate your bank applied.
We capture the mid-market rate
 – From regulated interbank data sources at the exact transaction time.
Instant audit report
 – Spread %, FX cost in your base currency, execution grade (A/B/C), and annual savings projection.
Trust & Compliance
MSB FINTRAC C10001283 | 0-custody | AES-256 | Built in Canada 🇨🇦

llm_raw.description: A FINTRAC-registered FX verification tool that audits foreign-exchange transactions against mid-market rates to reveal hidden spreads and costs.
llm_raw.notes: The documentation page provides a conceptual overview and manual input workflow but contains no references to a public API, SDK, or developer portal.
